name: ai-triage-kiosk-demo
description: English synthetic-data AI triage kiosk demo for workflow-support review.

scripts.api:start: uv run --project python_api python -m uvicorn python_api.main:app --host 127.0.0.1 --port 8000
scripts.api:start:render: uv run --project python_api python -m uvicorn python_api.main:app --host 0.0.0.0 --port ${PORT:-8000}
scripts.render:build: npm run test:python && npm run smoke
scripts.test: npm run test:unit && npm run test:contract
scripts.test:python: uv run --project python_api python -m pytest python_api/tests
scripts.demo:ready: npm run test:python && npm test && npm run smoke && npm run build && git diff --check
